extraction.one_line_summary: MCNULTY Brandon won from 3-rider breakaway finale after HEALY Ben attacks failed, holding off late surge from FRIGO Marco on Bergamo cobbles.
tactical_patterns: HEALY Ben repeatedly attacked climbs 50km-35km out but couldn't sustain gaps on descents, signaling insufficient power reserves for solo efforts.
MCNULTY Brandon marked HEALY's moves without taking pulls, preserving sprint legs to win from select break at 500m on technical finish.
ALMEIDA Bruno lost 30+ seconds while ROGLIC Primoz's team set tempo, revealing defensive weakness of first-time GC leader on selective stage.
UAE sent MCNULTY into break while protecting ALMEIDA in GC group, demonstrating dual-objective racing with sufficient team depth.

rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: won KOM sprints and attacked multiple times 50-35km out but lacked diesel to sustain solo efforts to finish
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: first Grand Tour stage win after tactical patience, marked without working, closed 40s gap on descent
rider_signals.FRIGO Marco: positive: dropped twice but regained contact, nearly won sprint from disadvantaged position showing resilience
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Bruno: negative: lost 30+ seconds as first-time Grand Tour leader under pressure from ROGLIC team tempo
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: team controlled pace but gained minimal time, suggests waiting for Monte Bondoni MTF
